message:
test(mux_pool): add health_check_with_cx recovery and no-recovery tests

Two new async tests for MuxPool health check behavior:
- pool_health_check_with_cx_recovers_from_unexpected_response: verifies
  that with recovery enabled, the pool reconnects after an unexpected
  list-panes response and reports exactly one recovery attempt/success.
- pool_health_check_with_cx_without_recovery_does_not_retry: verifies
  that with recovery disabled, the health check fails without attempting
  reconnection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
